Recipient: Monsieur Emile Baraize, Directeur des travaux du Service des Antiquités à Kena
Brief_Summary: M. Chaban, the Director General of the Antiquities Service, sends a railway bill of lading for beams, iron, and sheet metal to Monsieur Emile Baraize, Director of Works in Kena, requesting acknowledgment of receipt and the return of a signed form.
English_Translation:
SURVEY OF EGYPT
GIZA (Mudiria)
18th. February, 1922.

ANTIQUITIES SERVICE.
INSPECTORATE
OF THE
MIDDLE EGYPT. March 1, 1922.
Subject - Sending bill of lading concerning beams, iron & sheet metal.

No. 5-2/5
Attached documents: a bill of lading
and a form No. 194

Dear Sir, the Director,

In response to your letter of February 9, 1922, No. 155,
I have the honor to transmit to you herewith a railway
bill of lading concerning the dispatch
by slow freight of beams, iron & sheet metal, with
the request that you kindly acknowledge receipt thereof &
return the attached form No. 194 duly
signed.
Please accept, Sir, the Director, the assurance
of my most distinguished consideration.

M. Chaban
THE DIRECTOR GENERAL

Mr. Emile Baraize
Director of Works
of the Antiquities Service
in Kena.
Stamps_and_Annotations: Annotation: Modèle N° 25 — اورنيك نمرة ٢٥ (appears twice)
Handwritten Arabic: ان (next to Pièces jointes)
Handwritten Arabic: ان (next to formule N° 194)
Stamp: EGYPTIAN GOVERNMENT HEAD OFFICE MAILS
Full_Transcription:
SURVEY OF EGYPT
GIZA (Mudiria)
18th. February, 1922.

[Handwritten Arabic: دهان]
[Handwritten Arabic: من]
[Handwritten Arabic: نمرة]

(Modèle N° 25 — [Handwritten Arabic: اورنيك نمرة ٢٥])
(Modèle N° 25 — [Handwritten Arabic: اورنيك نمرة ٢٥])

SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS.
INSPECTORAT
DE LA
MOYENNE EGYPTE. 1/3/1922.
Objet- envoi connaissement relatif à des poutrel-
les , fers & tôle .

N° 5-2/5
Pièces jointes [Handwritten Arabic: ان] connaissement
et [Handwritten Arabic: ان] formule N° 194

R.P. Monsieur le Directeur,

En réponse à votre lettre du 9/2/1922 N°155,
j'ai l'honneur de vous transmettre ci -joint un con-
naissement de chemin de fer relatif à l'expédition
par petite vitesse des poutrelles , fers & tôle avec
priére de vouloir bien nous en accuser réception &
nous retourner la formule N°194 ci -jointe dûment
signée .
Veuillez agréer , Monsieur le Directeur ,l'assu-
rance de ma considération très distinguée .

[Handwritten signature: M. Chaban]
LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL

[Stamp: 32 D)]
[Stamp: EGYI GOVER]
[Handwritten Arabic: مصلحة]

Monsieur Emile Baraize
Directeur des travaux
du Service des Antiquités
à Kena.

[Stamp: CAIRO -1. MAR. 22. 22. PP]
[Handwritten Arabic: صادر]

[Stamp: EGYI GOVER]
[Handwritten Arabic: مصلحة]

[Stamp: EGYPTIAN GOVERNMENT HEAD OFFICE MAILS]
